item.title: A little talk about panorama
item.description:
全景图本身并不神秘。

普通的图片，记录的只是在一个位置，一个视角下观察到的场景； 而全景图可以记录一个位置，所有视角可观察到的场景。

全景图虽起名全景，但本质还是图片，可以和普通图片对比着来理解。

item.title: understanding euler angles
item.description:
Rotation is a big part of transformation in 3d programming. Every programmer have to understand the underlying math things.

I have known about Euler angles for a while, and today we talk about some more details about it.

item.title: A simple way to draw a circle always facing you
item.description: In the latest work about deferred shading light, I need to figure out a way to demonstrate the light range of point light, so that user can easily tune the parameters about the light.
